response:
Yes, it's quite common to feel insignificant or small in the face of the vastness of the world or the complexity of life. Many people experience moments of self-doubt or a sense of insignificance, especially during times of stress, uncertainty, or when facing challenges that seem overwhelming. This feeling is often referred to as "smallness" or "minutiae," and it can be a natural part of the human experience.
